blockingIssues.description: Fix feature was never implemented. Kas sync queue payloads still use `transaction_date` while batchSyncService.ts expects `tanggal` for periode routing, causing all Kas transactions to sync to the wrong periode database.

Fix feature was never implemented. Master data local-first sync remains unwired: preload.ts and electron.d.ts lack local-first COA/Blok bindings, COA/Blok form/list pages still use direct non-sync APIs, and AspekKerja lacks local-first operations entirely.

Fix feature was never implemented. IPC event listeners in SyncContext.tsx (onAutoSyncTimerStatus, onAutoSyncTimerProgress, onAutoSyncTimerResult, onNetworkStatusChange, onNetworkStatusSyncControl) are still never removed, causing listener accumulation and memory leak on every offline/online transition.

Fix feature was never implemented. Jest is still not installed or configured, the test script is still a no-op, and src/main/syncE2e.test.ts remains unexecutable and heavily mocked with only 100 records in the performance test instead of the required 1000+.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention that IPC listeners registered in React useEffect must always be removed in the cleanup function. Reference the specific APIs: onAutoSyncTimerStatus, onAutoSyncTimerProgress, onAutoSyncTimerResult, onNetworkStatusChange, onNetworkStatusSyncControl.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F017 review found a blocking memory leak in SyncContext.tsx because 5 renderer IPC listeners were never cleaned up, and the effect re-runs on every offline/online transition. F017-FIX was never implemented, so the leak persists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit integration checklist for wiring local-first sync operations through preload.ts -> electron.d.ts -> renderer form/list pages. The checklist should be referenced for all new module integrations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F016 failed because localFirst operations for COA/Blok existed in main but were never exposed in preload/types or used in renderer pages. F016-FIX was never implemented, so master data sync remains broken.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that end-to-end test assertions (VAL-FLOW-*) must use real Electron/browser automation and actual API/database calls. Mocked unit tests alone do not satisfy the validation contract.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F019 added syncE2e.test.ts with mocked dependencies and no real network/DB exercised. F019-FIX was never implemented, so no real test runner or E2E tests exist.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the field naming convention for periode derivation: batchSyncService.ts expects the transaction date field to be named `tanggal` in sync queue payloads.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F013 review found Kas uses `transaction_date` in localFirstOperations.ts but batchSyncService.ts checks for `tanggal`, causing wrong periode routing. F013-FIX was never implemented, so the mismatch persists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider splitting UI sync integration features (e.g., SyncStatusBar, offline banners) to a frontend-specific skill, or extend backend-worker with a renderer-side integration procedure. Currently backend-worker only covers schema changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F017 and F019-UI were assigned backend-worker but the work was entirely React/UI. The skill file contains no UI procedures, and workers reported following the skill despite it being mismatched.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the convention that every ipcRenderer.on listener exposed in preload.ts must have a matching removal method (off/unsubscribe) so React useEffects can clean them up.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F017-FIX review confirmed preload.ts still registers listeners without off methods, and AGENTS.md has no guidance on listener cleanup.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The backend-worker skill should include a concrete 5-step local-first integration checklist: (1) add operations to localFirstOperations.ts, (2) add IPC handlers in main.ts, (3) expose APIs in preload.ts, (4) add types in electron.d.ts, (5) update form/list pages to use local-first APIs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F016-FIX review found the original F016 worker missed steps 3-5, and the fix was never spawned. F013-F015 successfully followed all 5 steps.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml should add a softwaresawit-api service entry.
services.yaml test command should be updated to actually run jest.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — F019-FIX was never implemented so no jest config exists to wire up yet
